framework.name: Gartner AI-Ready Data Framework
framework.description: Five-step operational definition: align data to use cases, establish asset-level governance, active metadata management, reliable pipelines with SLAs, continuous quality assurance. Predicts 60% abandonment rate through 2026 for projects lacking this.
framework.raw_quote: AI-ready data is data aligned to specific use cases, actively governed at the asset level, supported by automated pipelines with quality gates, managed through live metadata, and continuously quality-assured.

source.title: Why 95% of AI Projects Fail and How Data Fixes It - SR analytics
